title: Disabling Versioning of S3 Buckets is Security Sensitive
description: Disabling versioning on an Amazon S3 bucket can lead to data loss or unauthorized access.

noncompliant.description: Versioning is suspended on the bucket.

compliant.description: Versioning is enabled on the bucket.

why_is_this_an_issue: Disabling versioning on an S3 bucket can lead to data loss or unauthorized access if a version of an object is accidentally deleted or if an object is overwritten with malicious data.
how_to_fix: Enable versioning on the S3 bucket using the AWS Management Console, AWS CLI, or SDKs.
